title: Rhaptostylum kappleri
taxonomy: Rhaptostylum kappleri is a genus of corals in the family Caryophylliidae. It is a species of stony coral. Rhaptostylum kappleri belongs to the phylum Cnidaria, class Anthozoa, and order Scleractinia. The classification of Rhaptostylum kappleri further includes the family Caryophylliidae, subfamily Caryophylliinae, and tribe Caryophylliini. This classification indicates its position in the coral family tree.
